3172870.name: Camp Buddy: Scoutmaster Season Soundtrack
3172870.description:
Listen to the soundtrack of the hit BL Visual Novel, Camp Buddy: Scoutmaster Season! This soundtrack features Thirty-five (35) original compositions created by the game's multiple composers, including HMNK, MYM and KENO! Each track was designed and beautifully rendered to match the various events of the game, and is the perfect accompaniment for daily listens!

Also included in the game's soundtrack is the opening theme 'Buddy Oath' - an original song, written by Mikkoukun and Zael and performed by KENO, which encompasses the nostalgic and heartfelt nature of the game. Listen to the shortened version as seen in the game's opening video, or the full, 5 minute version!
